## You're a superorganism

![Image 9](https://www.biotikur.com/cdn/shop/files/image.png?v=1705498346&width=1500)

## Care for your gut health

There are trillions of good bacteria in your body. **More than 90% live in your gut.**They make powerful nutrients from gut-healthy plants and fight off illness.You keep them alive and they help you thrive.

But when they fall out of balance, bad things happen. Many health complaints begin with an imbalanced gut.*
